title: WA7 4JE: INDUSTRIAL CHEMICALS LIMITED : permit surrender issued - EPR/EP3635TU/S004
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter and decision document for:    Operator name: INDUSTRIAL CHEMICALS LIMITED   Installation name: Runcorn Iron Salts   Permit number: EPR/EP3635TU/S004   "
